Hero.title: ZOOMA
Hero.badge: A company that merged all developers in one place
Hero.subtitle: The smart one seizes the opportunity! At ZOOMA, we've gathered web developers, social media and brand identity designers, Google Maps specialists, and Meta ads professionals (Facebook & Instagram) to boost your visibility... all in one place! Instead of dealing with multiple agencies, we combined everything you need to upgrade your store. Jordan is embracing this digital evolution, be among the first!

Package.title: Stores Package
Package.subtitle: For any store — supermarket, restaurant, watch shop, food stall, or any business big or small. This package is for you!
Package.tagline: Save your spare change every day (35 piasters)

features.f1: Website design showcasing your business, products, services, and prices
features.f2: Social media post designs upon request (10 per month)
features.f3: Adding your location to Google Maps to appear in searches
features.f4: Receive customer orders directly via WhatsApp or any app you choose
features.f5: A plastic QR stand placed in your store for customers to scan
features.f6: Brand identity design and custom cards
features.f7: Technical support throughout the subscription period

Companies.title: Companies Package
Companies.description: For any company — commercial, service-based, or any type. Contact us directly for subscription details.

features.f3: Full social media management — Facebook & Instagram
features.f4: Meta advertising campaigns to boost sales
features.f5: Adding your company to Google Maps
features.f6: Receive customer orders via WhatsApp and website
features.f7: VIP technical support throughout the subscription
